publishedAbstract: * `rook-ceph-operator` logs report of mon quorum issues even though OCS have 3 mon pods Running. ~~~ 53280:2021-03-18 10:56:43.090829 W | op-mon: failed to check mon health. failed to get mon quorum status: mon quorum status failed: exit status 1 53324:2021-03-18 10:57:43.200023 W | op-mon: failed to check mon health. failed to get mon quorum status: mon quorum status failed: exit status 1 ~~~ * `ceph-monitor` quorum is lost with 2 of 3 monitors being lost. How to restore it back?
publishedTitle: How to restore ceph-monitor quorum in Openshift Container Storage?
